overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic city sidewalk with a distinctive red bike lane. The character progresses from an open sunlit area toward and under a massive elevated highway overpass, passing industrial buildings and futuristic street furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban sidewalk with dedicated red transit lane

events.description: camera follows character turning slightly left to follow the sidewalk curve alongside red industrial building
approaching large metal billboard framework structure spanning across the road ahead

agents.ego_description: character with red cap and backpack walking steadily along the sidewalk, following the red bike lane

notable_agents.action: futuristic van driving along the multi-lane road parallel to the sidewalk
pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: distinctive red-colored dedicated lane running parallel to the road with drainage grates
tall industrial structure with red facade, metal scaffolding, and large ventilation pipes
large beige warehouse-style building with flat roof and minimal windows
massive concrete and steel highway structure curving through the cityscape
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and yellow structural accents
futuristic street lamps with orange glowing horizontal light bars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day in a futuristic city, following a character walking along a sidewalk next to a distinctive red bike lane. The camera moves past industrial buildings with the elevated highway infrastructure visible ahead. Sparse pedestrian traffic and occasional vehicles populate the scene as the character approaches a large metal framework structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional zone under billboard framework approaching overpass

events.description: passing under the large metal billboard framework with hanging digital advertisements
entering the shadow cast by the concrete overpass bridge, lighting becomes noticeably darker

agents.ego_description: character continues walking forward, passing under the metal framework and approaching the overpass shadow

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow outfit walking ahead, maintaining distance

entered.detail: industrial steel truss structure spanning the road with multiple digital billboards attached
massive concrete highway overpass with metal railings casting deep shadows below
tall red concrete wall running alongside the sidewalk under the overpass
bright yellow metal staircase attached to the industrial building providing access to upper levels

segments.scene_description: The character passes under a massive industrial billboard framework adorned with digital advertisements, transitioning from open sky to a semi-covered environment. The concrete overpass looms ahead as the lighting shifts to mixed shadows. A yellow staircase structure becomes visible on the left as the character enters the darker underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: fully entering the shadowed area under the overpass with artificial lighting from overhead fixtures

agents.ego_description: character walking through the shadowed underpass, following the red bike lane deeper under the highway

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the distance toward the overpass exit

entered.detail: darkened corridor beneath the highway with artificial lighting and graffiti on walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in the shadowy underpass beneath the elevated highway, with the concrete bridge deck directly overhead. The environment is noticeably darker with artificial lighting, creating a tunnel-like atmosphere. The character continues along the red bike lane flanked by the red retaining wall, with the glass corporate tower visible as a bright exit point in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright futuristic city that gradually descends into the oppressive shadows of a massive highway underpass. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk beside a distinctive red bike lane, moving past industrial buildings as the character approaches a large metal framework. As the camera passes under a massive industrial billboard adorned with digital advertisements, the open sky vanishes and the lighting shifts into a mix of deep shadows and concrete overhangs. The scene then transitions fully into the dark, tunnel-like atmosphere beneath the elevated highway, where the character continues along the red bike lane flanked by a red retaining wall. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the artificial light of the underpass toward a distant, brightly lit corporate glass tower that serves as the exit point.
